title: StormWatchers: Emergency
description: StormWatchers is a storm-chasing modpack that focuses on gameplay, while staying vanilla+ and lightweight — now powered by Protomanly's weather!
body:
⚠️ DISCLAIMER: This modpack does **NOT** run well on low-ends devices. Your PC must be somewhat modern to run this modpack well. ⚠️

![StormWatchers: Emergency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91eded3debb5f576badd091628407f87f0817265_0.webp)


**StormWatchers: Emergency** is the next step in the StormWatchers series — now built around ProtoManly's Weather mod. This modpack focuses on being optimized, vanilla-plus, and adding realistic weather in a way that enhances gameplay.

![FEATURES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11da908b0011c89a87c3559705083e8c57c2df96_0.webp)

✔️ Realistic weather with tornadoes, lightning, squalls and more — powered by ProtoManly’s Weather Mod


✔️ Gameplay focused and vanilla-friendly, with minimal impact on performance

✔️ Improved exploration with new world generation with Geophilic

✔️ Realistic seasons with Serene Seasons

✔️ Immersive soundscapes that enhances the atmosphere

✔️ Shaders support with PMShaders
